requirement_topic.en: Consumer Goods (Cosmetics) Information Standard 2020 Ingredient Labelling under Australian Consumer Law
requirement_topic.zh: 澳大利亚消费者法下《Consumer Goods (Cosmetics) Information Standard 2020》的成分标签
requirement_topic.zht: 澳洲消費者法下《Consumer Goods (Cosmetics) Information Standard 2020》的成分標籤

summary.en: Cosmetic products supplied in Australia must comply with the mandatory cosmetics ingredient labelling information standard. Ingredient information generally must be provided on the container or the product itself, and ingredients must be listed in descending order by volume or mass, with smaller-concentration ingredients allowed after the main ingredients according to the standard.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的化妆品必须符合强制性化妆品成分标签信息标准。成分信息通常须标注在容器或产品本体上，成分须按体积或质量递减顺序列出，低浓度成分可按标准在主要成分之后列出。
summary.zht: 在澳洲供應的化妝品必須符合強制性化妝品成分標籤資訊標準。成分資訊通常須標注在容器或產品本體上，成分須按體積或質量遞減順序列出，低濃度成分可按標準在主要成分之後列出。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Goods (Cosmetics) Information Standard 2020 / Consumer Goods (Cosmetics) Information Standard 2020
Australian Consumer Law — mandatory information standards for consumer goods

summary.en: China requires cosmetic labels to disclose ingredients and other mandatory product information under CSAR 2021, NMPA labelling measures, and GB 5296.3. Chinese domestic labels are normally in Chinese and are prepared for NMPA and China consumer disclosure requirements.
summary.zh: 中国依据CSAR 2021、NMPA标签管理办法及GB 5296.3要求化妆品标签披露成分及其他强制产品信息。中国境内标签通常使用中文，并面向NMPA及中国消费者披露要求制作。
summary.zht: 中國依據CSAR 2021、NMPA標籤管理辦法及GB 5296.3要求化妝品標籤披露成分及其他強制產品資訊。中國境內標籤通常使用中文，並面向NMPA及中國消費者披露要求製作。

standards_or_laws: GB 5296.3 — Instructions for use of consumer products — Cosmetics
NMPA Administrative Measures for Cosmetic Labelling

gap.en: A Chinese label cannot be assumed to satisfy Australia. The Australian label should be checked against the local ingredient information standard, including placement, ingredient order, nomenclature, small-package treatment, and any ACL misleading conduct risk. Claims and ingredient names translated from Chinese marketing copy should be reviewed separately.
gap.zh: 不能假定中国标签即可满足澳大利亚要求。澳大利亚标签应按当地成分信息标准核查，包括标注位置、成分顺序、命名、小包装处理及澳大利亚消费者法下的误导风险。从中文营销文案翻译而来的宣称和成分名称应单独审查。
gap.zht: 不能假定中國標籤即可滿足澳洲要求。澳洲標籤應按當地成分資訊標準核查，包括標注位置、成分順序、命名、小包裝處理及澳洲消費者法下的誤導風險。從中文營銷文案翻譯而來的宣稱和成分名稱應單獨審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Australian cosmetics ingredient labelling information standard applies to covered cosmetic goods
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CN cosmetic ingredient labelling applies under GB 5296.3, CSAR 2021, and NMPA labelling rules

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare an Australia-specific ingredient label and verify it against the ACCC-administered mandatory information standard before supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】供应前应准备澳大利亚市场专用成分标签，并按ACCC负责执行的强制信息标准核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】供應前應準備澳洲市場專用成分標籤，並按ACCC負責執行的強制資訊標準核驗。
